data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: Encryption is applied to data at rest and in transit for user privacy.
data.technical_spec: AES-256 encryption, TLS for secure connections.

data.title: Threat Detection and Monitoring
data.description: Continuous monitoring for unusual activity using AI-driven tools.
data.technical_spec: SIEM tools, anomaly detection, real-time alerting.

data.title: Access Control and Authentication
data.description: Strict access control policies and multi-factor authentication (MFA) are enforced.

data.title: DDoS Protection
data.description: Strategies are implemented to mitigate the effects of distributed denial of service attacks.
data.technical_spec: Traffic filtering, rate limiting, failover strategies.

data.title: Security Patch Management
data.description: Regular updates and patches to software vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Automated patch deployment, vulnerability scanning tools.
